allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c['slug'], c.get\('sort_order','—'\), c['photo_ids'][:2]\) for c in d['collections']]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('public/portfolio.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(c['slug'], c.get\('sort_order','none'\), c['photo_ids'][:1]\) for c in d['collections']]")
